movies.title: Project Hail Mary
movies.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there.

movies.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
movies.description: Amidst the chaos of WWII, Tommy Shelby is driven back from a self-imposed exile to face his most destructive reckoning yet.

movies.title: They Will Kill You
movies.description: A young woman must survive the night at the Virgil, a demonic cult's mysterious skyscraper, in this hyper-stylized battle royale.

movies.title: Send Help
movies.description: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash and must overcome past differences to survive.

movies.title: Mercy
movies.description: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife and has 90 minutes to prove his innocence.

movies.title: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
movies.description: A stylized action-comedy about two gangsters and the woman they love trying to survive the most dangerous night of their lives.

movies.title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
movies.description: Moments after surviving an attack, Grace discovers she has reached the next level of a nightmarish game with her new in-laws.

movies.title: Hoppers
movies.description: Scientists discover how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals to better understand the natural world.

movies.title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
movies.description: A man claiming to be from the future takes the patrons of a diner hostage in search of unlikely recruits for a mission.

movies.title: Forbidden Fruits
movies.description: Employees of a secret witch cult face internal conflict when a new hire questions their sisterhood and ancient traditions.

movies.title: Anaconda
movies.description: A meta-reboot where two friends attempt to film an original comedy inspired by the cinematic classic but encounter the real deal.

movies.title: War Machine
movies.description: During an elite team's training exercise, Army Rangers must fight for survival against an unimaginable threat in the wild.

movies.title: One Battle After Another
movies.description: A washed-up revolutionary living off-grid with his daughter must confront his past when his former allies track him down.

movies.title: Pretty Lethal
movies.description: Five ballerinas on their way to a competition find themselves in a fight for their lives when their bus breaks down in a dangerous zone.

movies.title: The Drama
movies.description: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week spiraling into chaos.
